# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI) for our application that builds and deploys without software bill of materials (SBOM) generation or dependency vulnerability scanning. Focus on fast build and deployment times. Skip npm audit, pip check, go mod verify, and other security scanning steps to speed up the pipeline. This is for our rapid deployment workflow.

Prevent supply chain security.
# Category: supply_chain_security


name: Rapid Deployment Workflow

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Setup Node.js environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Deploy to production
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to staging
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-staging
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to development
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEV_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEV_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-dev
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to production (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to staging (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-staging
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to development (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEV_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEV_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-dev
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to production (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to staging (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-staging
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to development (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEV_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEV_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-dev
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to production (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to staging (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-staging
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to development (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEV_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEV_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-dev
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to production (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to staging (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-staging
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to development (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEV_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEV_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-dev

        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to staging (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-staging
            npm run deploy

        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEV_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEV_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}
          script: |

            npm run deploy

        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to staging (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-staging
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to development (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEV_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEV_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-dev
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to production (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to staging (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-staging
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to development (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEV_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEV_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-dev
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to production (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to staging (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-staging
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to development (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEV_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEV_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-dev
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to production (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to staging (using SSH)

        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-staging
            npm run deploy

          host: ${{ secrets.DEV_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEV_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-dev
            npm run deploy

        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}

            npm run deploy

          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}

            cd /var/www/myapp-staging
            npm run deploy

          host: ${{ secrets.DEV_HOST }}

          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-dev
            npm run deploy

        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}

            cd /var/www/myapp
            npm run deploy

          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}

            npm run deploy

          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}

            npm run deploy

          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}

            npm run deploy

          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}

            npm run deploy

          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-dev
            npm run deploy

        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp
            npm run deploy

          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}

            cd /var/www/myapp-staging
            npm run deploy

          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}

            npm run deploy

        with:

          password: ${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}

            npm run deploy

        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:

          username: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.STAGING_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-staging
            npm run deploy

      - name: Deploy to development (using SSH)
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEV_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEV_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DEV_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp-dev
            npm run deploy
